title: RESTORE - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Donations accepted, and pickup for larger items available. 52684 Highway 97 La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Summer hours Tuesday-Sunday 9am-5:30pm. Winter hours may vary, visit website or call. Donations: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 536-3234 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 536-3234 ReStore Manager Rick Bowe Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes and Klamath Counties SITE HOURS: Summer hours Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5:30pm. Winter hours may vary, visit website or call. Services: Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
